calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice And Motion For Assignment Of Rights Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Feb-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Angie Diner.
Atty. Philip T. Kilduff, specially appearing for the Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association Inc.
Witness for the Plaintiff Ross Hawkin was sworn and examined. The following exhibits were identified and later moved into evidence:
Exh. 1 - Application for Credit
Exh. 2 - Credit Master Display Printout
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants Spectrum Media Services Inc dba Spectrum Media, Thomas Cadez individually and Claire Long individually as Personal Guarantor;
Principal $ 58,907.16
Prejudgment Interest $ 6,859.50
Attorney's Fees $ 0
Costs $ 415.50 TOTAL JUDGMENT= $66,182.16
Judgment signed in open court. Exhibits were returned to counsel by stipulation.
